text:
The is a family from Ragako village. It is the family where Conny Springer hails from.

History

In year 847, Conny left the Ragako village to join the Military. His goal was to join the Military Police Regiment to make his mother proud and earn the respect of the villagers.

Story

The Struggle for Trost arc

In 850, Conny graduates then participates in the Struggle for Trost. Despite his fear of Titans and his want to please his mother, he eventually joins the Scout Regiment.

Clash of the Titans arc

 That same year, a mysterious Titan appears in Wall Rose and turns Ragako inhabitants in mindless Titans. Conny thus makes an unplanned return to his village and teams up with the Scout Regiment to make sure the villagers are fine. Once he arrives, he worriedly calls out for his family members. Eventually, Conny comes across his old house destroyed by a Titan laying on it.

Conny laments for his family and village afterward, and as he is about to leave, the Titan atop his house speaks and welcomes him home.

It is later discovered that the Titan laying atop Conny's house was originally Conny's mother.

Royal Government arc

Before the Scout Regiment's leave for Shiganshina District, Conny plans to visit his village, hoping he would discover something.

War for Paradis arc

During Marley's attack on Shiganshina, the Scouts capture Falco Grice, who had gained the power of the Jaw Titan in the midst of battle. When Jean Kirschtein considers feeding Falco to a Titan in the district, Conny insists that Falco should be fed to his mother. Armin Arlelt is against feeding Falco to any Titan in fears of prolonging hostility with the Warriors, but Conny decides to kidnap Falco and escape the battlefield as the others are preoccupied with approaching Titans.

At Ragako village, Conny attempts to feed Falco to his mother's Titan, but is foiled when Armin arrives and decides to sacrifice himself, forcing Conny to abandon his plan and save Armin. Conny realizes that even if his mother became human again, she would have suffered if she had inherited the Colossal Titan, lamenting how she told him to become a great soldier, but instead he almost killed a child and one of his friends. Instead, Conny hardens his resolve to save the people of the outside world, in order to do his mother proud.

After Eren Jaeger is killed by Mikasa Ackermann, Conny and his mother were able to revert back into human form. Three years after the Rumbling, Conny mentions that Historia Reiss took in his mother and Jean Kirschtein's family to protect them.

Members

Political members

Trivia

Springer is the German equivalent of the "Knight" figure in Chess.
